title: blob download: stored content-type reflected without sanitization
description: handle_jmap_upload stores the raw client-supplied Content-Type header in the blob table (no parsing, no allowlist). handle_jmap_download returns it as the response Content-Type header. A caller can upload with Content-Type: text/html and the blob download endpoint will serve it with that type. This is already tracked as nie-po5v.3 (XSS) but the correctness angle is different: if a client uploads with a malformed content-type (e.g. containing newlines), the raw bytes reach axum's header serializer, which may panic or produce a malformed HTTP response. Trigger: upload with Content-Type containing CRLF characters.
